name: chinese-trainer
description: An adaptive Mandarin learning app for vocabulary, pronunciation, sentences, and geography.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:data && npm run check:app
scripts.check:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check sentence-data.js && node --check word-data.js && node --check vocab-data.js && node --check grammar-data.js && node --check scripts/validate-data.js && node --check scripts/validate-app.js && node --check scripts/build-site.js && node --check scripts/build-vocab-data.js && node --check scripts/build-word-data.js
